allowed_changes.description: Add pre_existing_dirty_files capture at feature.md startup and pass to verification-examiner; update verification-examiner input contract and scope-boundary instruction

constraints: Do not change the epic-state.json schema for any field other than adding pre_existing_dirty_files
Do not alter the examiner's behavior for SPEC, TEST, QUALITY, or SECURITY questions — only scope-boundary (ARCHITECTURE) questions need the exclusion
Keep changes minimal and surgical — no refactoring of unrelated sections
non_goals: Line-precise hunk overlap detection (file-level exclusion is sufficient)
Retroactive patching of existing epic-state.json files
